BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.hospital.model.Cita.getDoctor() may expose internal representation by returning Cita.doctor

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: new com.hospital.model.Cita(Long, Doctor, LocalDateTime, String, String) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into Cita.doctor

Method.name: <init>
Method.Message: In method new com.hospital.model.Cita(Long, Doctor, LocalDateTime, String, String)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.hospital.model.Cita.setDoctor(Doctor) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into Cita.doctor

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica.getDoctor() may expose internal representation by returning HistoriaClinica.doctor

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica.getPaciente() may expose internal representation by returning HistoriaClinica.paciente

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: new com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica(Paciente, Doctor, String, String, String) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into HistoriaClinica.doctor

Method.Message: In method new com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica(Paciente, Doctor, String, String, String)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: new com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica(Paciente, Doctor, String, String, String) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into HistoriaClinica.paciente

Method.name: <init>
Method.Message: In method new com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica(Paciente, Doctor, String, String, String)

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica.setDoctor(Doctor) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into HistoriaClinica.doctor

BugInstance.ShortMessage: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugInstance.LongMessage: com.hospital.model.HistoriaClinica.setPaciente(Paciente) may expose internal representation by storing an externally mutable object into HistoriaClinica.paciente

BugPattern.ShortDescription: May expose internal representation by incorporating reference to mutable object
BugPattern.Details: This code stores a reference to an externally mutable object into the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Storing a copy of the object is better approach in many situations.

BugPattern.ShortDescription: May expose internal representation by returning reference to mutable object
BugPattern.Details: Returning a reference to a mutable object value stored in one of the object's fields exposes the internal representation of the object.  If instances are accessed by untrusted code, and unchecked changes to the mutable object would compromise security or other important properties, you will need to do something different. Returning a new copy of the object is better approach in many situations.

This class is a Spring Controller. All methods annotated with RequestMapping (as well as its shortcut annotations GetMapping, PostMapping, PutMapping, DeleteMapping, and PatchMapping) are reachable remotely. This class should be analyzed to make sure that remotely exposed methods are safe to expose to potential attackers.

BugCode.Description: Method returning array may expose internal representation
